docket_entries.description: ORDER ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDARI, SAEEDEH HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $549.45 FILED BY YEUNG, OTTO AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDARI, SAEEDEH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SAEEDEH HEIDARI FOR HEARING SET ON 7/15/21 @ 11AM
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YEUNG, OTTO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED NOV-06-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDARI, SAEEDEH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2021 - JUDGMENT. - PLAINTIFF OTTO YEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAEEDEH HEIDARI IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEUNG, OTTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEIDARI, SAEEDEH $549.45 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $619.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR OTTO YEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR SAEEDEH HEIDARI IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS JUDGMENT CREDITOR THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $619.45 BY VENMO IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR CONFIRMS RECEIPT OF PAYMENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2020 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-09-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. (506)
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);PROOF RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGINAL SUBPOENA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDARI, SAEEDEH
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-11-2021 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDARI, SAEEDEH
